summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing enablement programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can ramp people faster—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {coord|coordination and logistics} for 20+ {prog|enablement programs} across Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams
Establish {onb|onboarding} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, reducing {onb|ramp time} by 75% via clearer protocols
Facilitate {prog|training webinars} for 600+ participants, boosting engagement and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Drive adoption of a new sales process by interviewing reps to find friction, then building a one-page enablement asset that lifted usage
Optimized {onb|onboarding} processes for new hires across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership {prog|training} program for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations

Strengthened {cross|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed training strategy
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to {data|track} satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal {prog|training} on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Delivered 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects spanning survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Developed proficiency across HR functions, from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Drafted job descriptions and {coord|coordinated} a challenging international hiring effort end-to-end
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and {cross|customer service}, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized {coord|recruiting events} and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students
As a team of consultants, partnered with an HR client to audit 300+ leave cases, quantifying $362K in costs to refute assumptions
Empowered the client team to present executive-ready {data|data} insights, driving policy redesigns and first aid training
